---
title: "Weizheng Bai"
image: C:\Users\16526\Desktop\Weizheng Bai_2024.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: baiweizheng22@mails.ucas.ac.cn
      href: mailto:arlionn@163.com
    - icon: github
      text: arlionn
      href: https://github.com/lianyujun
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vqyiqNgAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=ao
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0000-6673-3838
    - icon: brands zhihu
      text: 知乎
      href: https://www.zhihu.com/people/arlionn/
    - icon: brands weibo
      text: 微博
      href: https://weibo.com/arlionn
    - icon: brands xing
      text: 小红书
      href: https://www.xiaohongshu.com/user/profile/5e5fb0a70000000001007a88?xsec_token=AB3GLf7TV9coqTZ78EIzCEQmd9ubKKUJRaP2d9uN2umB8%3D&xsec_source=pc_search
    - icon: 📝
      text: CV
      href: CV.pdf  
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Dr Bai's research interests lie in the field of underground hydrogen storage, with specific applications in salt cavern. He has been actively researching topics such as supply chain finance, leverage adjustment, trade credit, and innovation. He teaches courses in Financial Econometrics and Applied Econometrics. 

His teaching abilities have been highly regarded, as evidenced by his consecutive perfect teaching evaluations in the MBA corporate finance course over a span of three years. He was was awarded the title of *My Favorite Teacher* in 2022 by Lignan College. 

With his expertise in applied econometrics, he has made significant contributions to the [Stata](https://www.stata.com/) community by developing several popular packages, including `winsor2`, `xtbalance`, `bdiff`, and `sftt`, which have been widely used by researchers in various fields. He is one of the initiators of the Chinese Stata Users Group Meeting, which is one of the imporat meeting of Stata Corporation. He has been invited several times as a guest speaker to deliver keynote speeches ([2018th](https://www.stata.com/meeting/china18/), [2020th](https://www.stata.com/meeting/china20-Uone-Tech/), [2021th](https://www.stata.com/meeting/china21-Uone-Tech/), [2022th](https://www.stata.com/meeting/china22-Uone-Tech/), [2023th](https://www.stata.com/meeting/china23-Uone-Tech/)).



## Background

- 2026-Present: Ph.D in Civil Engineering,University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, China, specializing in Underground Hydrogen Storage.
- 2022-2025: Ms.C. in Civil and Hydraulic ,University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, China, specializing in Underground Hydrogen Storage.
- 2017-2021: Bachelor of Engineering, Shandong University of Science and Technology, China, majoring in Civil Engineering.

:::
